<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\Attributes; use Attribute; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ #[Attribute(Attribute::TARGET_CLASS | Attribute::IS_REPEATABLE)] final readonly class UsesFunction { /** * @var non-empty-string */ private string $functionName; /** * @param non-empty-string $functionName */ public function __construct(string $functionName) { $this->functionName = $functionName; } /** * @return non-empty-string */ public function functionName(): string { return $this->functionName; } }
